lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਮਨਹਿ ਸਧਾਰੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak daas gobind saranaaee har preetam maneh sadhaaro |3|
lines.english: Slave Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of the Lord of the Universe; the Beloved Lord is the Support of the mind. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਕੈ ਮਧਿ ਸਭ ਹੂ ਤੇ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਰਾਗ ਦੋਖ ਤੇ ਨਿਆਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kai madh sabh hoo te baahar raag dokh te niaaro |
lines.english: He is inside all, and outside of all; He is untouched by love or hate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਖੋਜਤ ਖੋਜਤ ਜੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਸੁ ਘਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mai khojat khojat jee har nihachal su ghar paaeaa |
lines.english: I searched and searched, and found the immovable, unchanging home of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਅਧ੍ਰੁਵ ਡਿਠੇ ਜੀਉ ਤਾ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh adhruv dditthe jeeo taa charan kamal chit laaeaa |
lines.english: I have seen that everything is transitory and perishable, and so I have linked my consciousness to the Lotus Feet of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਹਉ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਦਾਸੀ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: prabh abinaasee hau tis kee daasee marai na aavai jaae |
lines.english: God is eternal and unchanging, and I am just His hand-maiden; He does not die, or come and go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੁਤਿ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਕਰਤੇ ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: srut simrit gun gaaveh karate sidh saadhik mun jan dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: The Vedas and the Simritees sing the Praises of the Creator, while the Siddhas, seekers and silent sages meditate on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮ ਅਰਥ ਕਾਮ ਸਭਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਮਨਿ ਚਿੰਦੀ ਇਛ ਪੁਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: dharam arath kaam sabh pooran man chindee ichh pujaae |
lines.english: He is overflowing with Dharmic faith, wealth and success; He fulfills the desires of the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਨਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak saran kripaa nidh suaamee vaddabhaagee har har gaaeaa |4|1|11|
lines.english: Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of his Lord and Master, the treasure of mercy; by great good fortune, he sings the Praises of the Lord, Har, Har. ||4||1||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੈ ਵੇਸਿ ਦੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਪਰ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵਣ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: soohai ves dohaaganee par pir raavan jaae |
lines.english: In her red robes, the discarded bride goes out, seeking enjoyment with another's husband.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਰ ਸੂਹੀ ਕੀ ਸਲੋਕਾ ਨਾਲਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: vaar soohee kee salokaa naal mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Vaar Of Soohee, With Saloks Of The Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਛੋਡਿਆ ਘਰਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਮੋਹੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: pir chhoddiaa ghar aapanai mohee doojai bhaae |
lines.english: She leaves the husband of her own home, enticed by her love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਠਾ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਖਾਇਆ ਬਹੁ ਸਾਦਹੁ ਵਧਿਆ ਰੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: mitthaa kar kai khaaeaa bahu saadahu vadhiaa rog |
lines.english: She finds it sweet, and eats it up; her excessive sensuality only makes her disease worse.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਪਲਟਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਾਜਿ ਸੀਗਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su palattiaa har raatee saaj seegaar |
lines.english: But she who becomes Gurmukh, turns away from corruption and adorns herself, attuned to the Love of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਧੁ ਭਤਾਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਛੋਡਿਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਲਗਾ ਜਾਇ ਵਿਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: sudh bhataar har chhoddiaa fir lagaa jaae vijog |
lines.english: She forsakes the Lord, her sublime Husband, and then later, she suffers the pain of separation from Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗਿਆਕਾਰੀ ਸਦਾ ਸੋੁਹਾਗਣਿ ਆਪਿ ਮੇਲੀ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aagiaakaaree sadaa souhaagan aap melee karataar |
lines.english: She is humble and obedient; she is His virtuous bride forever; the Creator unites her with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜਿ ਸਚੁ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj sach pir raaviaa har naamaa ur dhaar |
lines.english: She enjoys her celestial Husband Lord, and enshrines the Lord's Name within her heart.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਿਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਦਾ ਸੋੁਹਾਗਣਿ ਨਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak pir paaeaa har saachaa sadaa souhaagan naar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, she who has obtained the True Lord as her husband, is a happy soul-bride forever. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹਵੀਏ ਨਿਮਾਣੀਏ ਸੋ ਸਹੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਮੑਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: soohavee nimaanee so sahu sadaa samaal |
lines.english: O meek, red-robed bride, keep your Husband Lord always in your thoughts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਵਾਰਹਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਕੁਲੁ ਭੀ ਛੁਟੀ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak janam savaareh aapanaa kul bhee chhuttee naal |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, your life shall be embellished, and your generations shall be saved along with you. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਧਰਤੀ ਸਾਜੀਅਨੁ ਸਚੀ ਧਰਮਸਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: hukame dharatee saajeean sachee dharamasaalaa |
lines.english: By the Hukam of His Command, He created the earth, the true home of Dharma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਤਖਤੁ ਰਚਾਇਓਨੁ ਆਕਾਸ ਪਤਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape takhat rachaaeon aakaas pataalaa |
lines.english: He Himself established His throne, in the Akaashic ethers and the nether worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਇ ਖਪਾਇਦਾ ਸਚੇ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: aap upaae khapaaeidaa sache deen deaalaa |
lines.english: He Himself created and destroys; He is the True Lord, merciful to the meek.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸੰਬਾਹਿਦਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨਿਰਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa rijak sanbaahidaa teraa hukam niraalaa |
lines.english: You give sustenance to all; how wonderful and unique is the Hukam of Your Command!

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਆਪੇ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape aap varatadaa aape pratipaalaa |1|
lines.english: You Yourself are permeating and pervading; You Yourself are the Cherisher. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹਬ ਤਾ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: soohab taa sohaaganee jaa man laihi sach naau |
lines.english: The red-robed woman becomes a happy soul-bride, only when she accepts the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਅਪਣਾ ਮਨਾਇ ਲੈ ਰੂਪੁ ਚੜੀ ਤਾ ਅਗਲਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur apanaa manaae lai roop charree taa agalaa doojaa naahee thaau |
lines.english: Become pleasing to your True Guru, and you shall be totally beautified; otherwise, there is no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਬਣਾਇ ਤੂ ਮੈਲਾ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aisaa seegaar banaae too mailaa kade na hovee ahinis laagai bhaau |
lines.english: So decorate yourself with the decorations that will never stain, and love the Lord day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਚਿਹਨੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਮੁਖੁ ਉਜਲਾ ਖਸਮੈ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sohaagan kaa kiaa chihan hai andar sach mukh ujalaa khasamai maeh samaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, what is the character of the happy soul-bride? Within her, is Truth; her face is bright and radiant, and she is absorbed in her Lord and Master. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਕਾ ਵੇ ਹਉ ਸੂਹਵੀ ਸੂਹਾ ਵੇਸੁ ਕਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: lokaa ve hau soohavee soohaa ves karee |
lines.english: O people: I am in red, dressed in a red robe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਸੀ ਸਹੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਸ ਰਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: vesee sahu na paaeeai kar kar ves rahee |
lines.english: But my Husband Lord is not obtained by any robes; I have tried and tried, and given up wearing robes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨੀ ਸਹੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਿਨੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਿਖ ਸੁਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: naanak tinee sahu paaeaa jinee gur kee sikh sunee |
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone obtain their Husband Lord, who listen to the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਥੀਐ ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਕੰਤ ਮਿਲੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai so theeai in bidh kant milee |2|
lines.english: Whatever pleases Him, happens. In this way, the Husband Lord is met. ||2||
